历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were 13637 → 14096 → 11813 → 8647 → 16983 respectively. In 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination, there was a significant forward shift (8647), and in 2025 it recovered to 16983, showing large fluctuations; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 16983. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Yunnan Province from 2021 to 2025 was 52 → 52 → 49 → 50 → 52 students, and the 2026 plan is 53 students, an increase of 1 student compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 1.9%, which has a limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 73rd, with rankings fluctuating between 60 and 73 in recent years, maintaining a stable overall level. The university has not appeared in reputation monitoring, Douyin popularity, or abnormal admission files, indicating stable reputation in recent years with no major negative public opinion, and general Douyin attention, with no significant psychological disturbance in application behavior.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, aligning with the university's advantageous engineering fields, attracting certain candidates. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Yunnan Province is approximately 229,000, an increase of about 32.3% compared to 173,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, an eastern coastal city, which has some regional appeal to candidates from the southwestern region, but it is not a hot preferred area.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 16983, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan by 1.9%, the significant increase of about 32.3% in Physics Category candidates, and stable reputation, the surge in candidate numbers is the main factor driving the ranking upward, with the limited mitigating effect of the slight enrollment expansion. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 17379, with a range of 16879 to 17879.
